section.title: Selected Projects
section.subtitle: A showcase of digital experiences that push boundaries and deliver results.

caseStudy.description: A modern video platform for creating and sharing short-form video content with advanced editing tools and social features.
challenges: Building a real-time video editing interface in the browser
Optimizing video upload and processing performance
Implementing smooth playback across various devices
Creating an intuitive user experience for non-technical users
solutions: Implemented WebAssembly for client-side video processing
Used Next.js for optimal performance and SEO
Integrated Cloudflare for global CDN delivery
Designed a drag-and-drop interface with real-time previews
